properties.name: qa.channel.iso8583.host
properties.description: ISO 8583 switch host for QA test channel.

properties.name: qa.channel.iso8583.port
properties.description: ISO 8583 switch port for QA test channel.

properties.name: qa.scenarios.pattern
properties.description: Classpath glob pattern for scenario YAML files.

properties.description: Classpath glob pattern for run YAML files.

properties.description: Classpath glob pattern for suite YAML files.

properties.name: qa.recorder.proxy.enabled
properties.description: Enable the QA recorder proxy for capturing live traffic.

properties.name: qa.recorder.proxy.port
properties.description: Port for the QA recorder proxy.

properties.name: qa.notifications.webhook-url
properties.description: Webhook URL for QA failure alerts (Slack or generic webhook).
